intent: Flag wire transfers over $100,000 from accounts with incomplete KYC verification for immediate compliance review
Escalate any transaction where either the originator or counterparty is in a high-risk jurisdiction like Cayman Islands or Panama
Detect cash deposits or check deposits just below $10,000 that may indicate structuring to avoid CTR reporting thresholds
Flag accounts that receive more than 3 transactions within a single hour as potential velocity anomalies
Identify transactions where funds appear to flow in a circular pattern back toward the originating account through intermediaries
